description.value:
Hive gangers are the foot soldiers of the underhive's countless criminal organisations. Desperate, violent, and loyal only to their gang, they control territory through intimidation and brutality.

Tactics: Gangers fight dirty. They ambush, use cover, and retreat if outgunned. In groups of 4-8, they try to flank and overwhelm. Morale collapses if their leader falls or if they take heavy casualties quickly.
